description:
Translated from : 
Chinese version】Updated on 2024.05.22, optimized the display of important indicators. Rebuilt using the new style of Grafana10, added the concept of health score, and added some charts of overall resource consumption information. Contains overall resource display and resource detail charts: CPU memory disk IO network and other monitoring indicators. https://github.com/starsliao/TenSunS

panels.title: 🏡Resource overview: Current JOB [$origin_prometheus: $job] Currently selected host [$show_name] Instance: $instance

panels.description:
Partition usage rate, disk read, disk writing, download bandwidth, upload bandwidth, if there are multiple network cards or multiple partitions, are the value of the highest use of the network card or partition.

Number of connections: Currestab -The current state is the number of TCP connections of Established or Close -WAIT.

Health value is a new indicator. According to the CPU, memory, IO calculated value, below 90 points indicates that the resource usage of the system needs to be paid attention. This is a test indicator. The parameters may need to be based on the actual situation.optimization.
panels.title: The Total Observation Form of the server [Total number of hosts: $total]

panels.description:
-P99: Data sets are arranged according to the sequence of lift, and the 99th position is large data.(That is, data in the 99%position after the elevation sequence is arranged)
-The table needs to increase the record rules on Prometheus (refer to the download page of the view board)
-In addition to the record rules for 1 hour, there will be displayed data.
-The time [7D: 1H] means that you need to check the data points per hour in the past 7 days.
panels.title: In the last 7 days P99 resource usage rate
Overall load and overall average CPU usage rate
Overall memory and overall average memory usage rate
Overall general disk and overall average disk usage rate

panels.description:
In this viewing board: the total amount of disk, usage, amount, available, and usage, and the value of SIZE, USEd, Avail, Use% of the DF command, and the value of the USE%.Essence

Note: The USE%algorithm in the DF is: (SIZE -Free) * 100 / (avail + (size -free)). As a result, the division is the value, and the unit of the value is +1, and the result of the result is%.
Reference DF command source code:
panels.title: 【$show_name】: Partition available space (EXT.*/XFS/NFS)

matcher.options: Waiting for IO to complete the obstruction process

targets.legendFormat: Waiting for IO to complete the obstruction process

panels.description:
Read Time Seconds Each disk partitioned the number of seconds to read operations

Write Time Seconds Each disk partition is written for seconds

IO Time Seconds Each disk partition input/output operation costs the number of seconds

IO Time Weighted Seconds Each disk partition input/output operation costs weighted seconds
panels.title: Time to read and write each time (reference: less than 100ms)

panels.description:
Reads Completed: Each disk partition is read per second

Writes Completed: Each disk partition is written per second to complete the number of times

IO NOW's input/output request number is processed per second in each disk partition
panels.title: Disk reading and writing rate (IOPS)

panels.description:
Read Bytes Each disk partition reads the number of bits and bits read per second
Written Bytes Each disk partition is written in the number of bites per second
panels.title: Disk read and write capacity per second

panels.description:
Every second, it takes time to spend on I/O.(WALL-CLOCK TIME)

node_disk_io_time_seconds_total:
Disk spend in the number of seconds in input/output operation.This value is an additional value.(MilliseConds Spent Doing I/OS)

Iraate (node_disk_io_time_seconds_total [1m]):
Calculate the rate per second: (Last value-first one value)/time stamp difference, that is, the proportion of time spending in I/O operation within 1 second.

matcher.options: Idle - Waiting for something to happen
Disk spending on I/O operations proportion

panels.title: I/O operating time per second (I/O Util)

panels.description:
Sockets_used -The total amount of all protocols that has been used

Currestab -The current status is ESTABLISHED or CLOSE -WAIT TCP connection number

TCP_ALLOC -The number of TCP sockets that have been allocated (established and applied for SK_BUFF)

TCP_TW -The number of TCP connections waiting to be closed

UDP_INUSE -Number of UDP sockets that are using

Retranssegs -TCP Re -pass message number

The number of messages sent by Outsegs -TCP

Insegs -TCP receiving number of messages

properties.value: The total amount of all protocols that has been used

panels.title: Network socket connection information
Use $device per second on the network bandwidth

title: Node Exporter Dashboard
